title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr Anton Harder
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Mr Anton Harder  Teacher reference number: 1062753  Teacher’s date of birth: 9 April 1988  Location teacher worked: Thetford, East of England  Date of professional conduct panel: 12 December 2025  Outcome type: prohibition order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Mr Anton Harder, formerly employed in Thetford, East of England. "
